title: Lake Legends
subTitle: Mobile Fishing Game
shortDescription: A mobile fantasy fishing game that combines exploration, collection, and progression.
description:
Lake Legends is a fantasy fishing game focused on exploration, collection, and progression. Players travel across mystical lakes inspired by Viking, Norse, and medieval themes, catching more than 500 fish species while uncovering environmental lore and hidden stories tied to each location.
The game includes gear collection and upgrade systems, including a gacha-based mechanic to earn fishing gear. As a free-to-play title, Lake Legends combines relaxing fishing mechanics with long-term progression, collectible content, and light narrative exploration.
It was originally a month long student project at Forsbergsskola that eventually became a commercial project when we started Bridge Games Studio.
role: Lead developer. Responsible for developing the entire game, including gameplay mechanics, loot generation, integrating plugins, and gameplay architecture.
contributions: Integrated Firebase Firestore, Authentication, Analytics, Crashlytics, and Remote Config.
Created an extensive loot system with thousands of variations.
Created multiple gameplay systems such as achievements, daily objectives, tutorials, and the main fishing minigame.
Leveling system with experience points, rewards, and unlockable profile pictures.
Implemented Unity LevelPlay Ads for rewarded ads.
Implemented Unity In-App Purchasing for in-game purchases.
GitHub Actions CI/CD for Android and iOS running on a self-hosted macOS runner
Implemented Sound and Music Management with FMOD Studio.

title: Forceberg
subTitle: Physics-based Puzzle Platformer
shortDescription: Forceberg is a physics-based puzzle platformer, created for the Black and White Jam №∞+1 game jam, which we also won.
contributions: Created the player controller and gravity manipulation system.
Created some of the levels.
Added high score system and optional on-screen timer.
Configured and programmed some of the physics objects.

title: Spellfire
subTitle: Multiplayer 1v1 Arena
shortDescription: Spellfire is a 1v1 spellcasting arena where the goal is to capture the middle of the map while holding off your opponent.
contributions: Made a server browser to be able to connect to your other steam users.
Implemented networking, replication of game state, and player input.
Implemented gameplay systems with spells, abilities, scoring, and win conditions.
Integrated FMOD Studio for sound effects and music.
Integrated Steamworks sessions using Advanced Sessions Plugin.

title: Landing Party
subTitle: Outdoor RPG
shortDescription: Landing Party is an outdoor RPG where players explore a foreign planet in their own backyard or local park.
role: AR Developer, Gameplay and systems developer.
contributions: Implemented AR interactions and gameplay mechanics.
Created a map system using raster tiles and MapBox.
Responsible for reviewing and merging over 1000 pull requests in a team of up to 15 developers.
Integrated animations, and sound effects with FMOD Studio.
Improved AR experience by refining how the world interacts with real slopes and terrain improving immersion.
